action.reasoning: Observation: Class weights + RandAugment caused a massive drop in accuracy (0.5628 -> 0.4012), likely due to underfitting from strong augmentation and instability from aggressive loss weighting. Analysis: Logit Adjustment (Menon et al., 2021) is a more elegant and stable method for long-tailed recognition that modifies logits based on class frequencies without changing the loss landscape as drastically. I will also replace RandAugment with standard CIFAR augmentations (RandomCrop, RandomHorizontalFlip) to prevent underfitting. Decision: Implement Logit Adjustment during training, use standard augmentations, and train for 12 epochs.
